$comment: THE CONTRACT between demo.html and the demo-server seeding task. Every Honua endpoint, service id, layer id, and OGC collection id the demo page touches is declared here and ONLY here. Seeded 2026-06-12 against the live demo server; this file reflects as-built reality. Deltas from the original contract, all forced by Honua server behavior: (1) FeatureServer layer indexes are the server-assigned publication ids (1..6), not 0 — Honua's layer-publish API numbers layers globally; (2) the MVT source-layer inside every tile is the constant 'layer' (PostGIS ST_AsMVT), while the OGC Tiles collection id in the URL still equals service.serviceId (the server resolves collections by resource name); (3) PostGIS-raster tiles are served by the ImageServer tile route, not MapServer; (4) elevation is served by Honua's /terrain/{dataset}/{z}/{x}/{y}.png route with Mapbox Terrain-RGB encoding (not terrarium, note x before y); (5) the glyph fontstack is the space-free 'NotoSansRegular' (API Gateway HTTP proxy to S3 rejects %20 path segments). CORS for https://honua.io is live on /rest/*, /ogc/*, /api/v1/tiles/* (app-level allowlist) and /fonts/* (bucket CORS, wildcard).
$basemapSeedingContract: SEEDED 2026-06-12 (Maui Nui): maui-basemap.pmtiles extracted from https://build.protomaps.com/20260610.pmtiles with --bbox=-157.40,20.45,-155.95,21.25 (all of Maui County: Maui, Molokaʻi, Lānaʻi, Kahoʻolawe) and uploaded to s3://honua-demo-data-585192672263/maui-basemap (ContentType application/vnd.pmtiles, metadata operation=publish — both required by the PMTiles range proxy). Served live at https://demo.honua.io/api/v1/tiles/pmtiles/maui-basemap.

server.$glyphsComment: Contract: the server serves SDF glyph PBFs for the font stack 'NotoSansRegular' at this route (API Gateway proxies /fonts/* to the demo data bucket; the space-free stack name is deliberate — API Gateway HTTP proxy integrations reject %20 path segments with a 505 from S3).

map.$comment: Framed for Maui Nui open data — the full Maui County extent (-157.40,20.45,-155.95,21.25): Maui, Molokaʻi, Lānaʻi, Kahoʻolawe.

basemap.$comment: Protomaps OSM basemap via Honua PMTiles proxy. Loaded beneath all data layers. Gracefully absent until the archive is seeded (demo.js catches 404 and stays on background color). Attribution appended to MapLibre attribution control when the basemap loads.

style.$comment: Minimal dark style targeting Protomaps v4 tile schema. Palette matches --bed- CSS variables: bg #08131a, surface #0e1e27, teal #3aa088, text-dim #8ea7a6. Layers ordered: earth → water → landuse → roads (3 classes) → boundaries → places.

service.$comment: ImageServer (not MapServer): Honua's MapServer tile route renders vector features; PostGIS-raster tiles are served by the ImageServer tile route.

layers.name: Aerial imagery

service.$comment: ImageServer (not MapServer): Honua's MapServer tile route renders vector features; PostGIS-raster tiles are served by the ImageServer tile route.

layers.attribution: USDA NAIP · Hawaiʻi Statewide GIS Program

service.$comment: Honua serves elevation via its dedicated terrain route (/terrain/{dataset}/{z}/{x}/{y}.png — note x/y order) using Mapbox Terrain-RGB encoding, not terrarium. service.path stays on MapServer for the availability probe.

layers.name: Zoning

tiles.$maxzoomComment: Source maxzoom: MapLibre overzooms beyond this instead of requesting deeper tiles — a z14 scene then needs ~2 z13 tiles, not ~18 z14 tiles, which the db.t4g.micro demo database cannot generate cold in parallel.
tiles.$sourceLayerComment: Honua's PostGIS MVT generator names the embedded vector-tile layer 'layer' (ST_AsMVT constant) regardless of collection id.

layers.attribution: County of Maui · Hawaiʻi Statewide GIS Program

layers.name: Parcels (TMK)
layers.attribution: Hawaiʻi Statewide GIS Program · County of Maui

layers.name: Place names
layers.attribution: USGS GNIS · Hawaiʻi Statewide GIS Program
